inlineContent.text: This class wraps the most common functionalities for communicating with the host operating system, such as the video driver, delays, environment variables, execution of binaries, command line, etc.
functions related to window management were moved to the

abstract.text: Provides access to common operating system functionalities.
A server interface for low-level window management.
Base class for all scene objects.

Returns

if the feature for the given feature tag is supported in the currently running instance, depending on the platform, build, etc. Can be used to check whether you’re currently running a debug build, on a certain platform or arch, etc. Refer to the [url=$DOCS_URL/tutorials/export/feature_tags.html]Feature Tags[/url] documentation for more details.

can optionally be given (defaulting to 0) to customize the exit status code.
On macOS (sandboxed applications only), this function clears list of user selected folders accessible to the application.

, the engine optimizes for low processor usage by only refreshing the screen if needed. Can improve battery consumption on mobile.

The amount of sleeping between frames when the low-processor usage mode is enabled (in microseconds). Higher values will result in lower CPU usage.

Base class for all other classes in the engine.
Reads a user input string from the standard input (usually the terminal). This operation is
, which causes the window to freeze if
is called on the main thread. The thread calling
will block until the program receives a line break in standard input (usually by the user pressing [kbd]Enter[/kbd]).
Returns the path to the current engine executable.

Variant objects box various Godot Objects, you create them with one of the
constructors, and you can retrieve the contents using the various extension
constructors that are declared on the various types that are wrapped.
Returns the amount of static memory being used by the program in bytes (only works in debug).
Returns the name of the CPU model on the host machine (e.g. “Intel(R) Core(TM) i7-6700K CPU @ 4.00GHz”).

Creates a new process that runs independently of Godot. It will not terminate if Godot terminates. The path specified in
must exist and be executable file or macOS .app bundle. Platform path resolution will be used. The
are used in the given order and separated by a space.

Returns an array of the system substitute font file paths, which are similar to the font with
and style for the specified text, locale and script. Returns empty array if no matching fonts found.
With this function, you can request dangerous permissions since normal permissions are automatically granted at install time in Android applications.

Permanently deletes the target file or an empty directory. The argument can be relative to the current directory, or an absolute path. If the target directory is not empty, the operation will fail.
On Android devices: With this function, you can get the list of dangerous permissions that have been granted.

Provides access to common operating system functionalities.
Initializes the singleton for the system MIDI driver.

Returns the exact production and build version of the operating system. This is different from the branded version used in marketing. This helps to distinguish between different releases of operating systems, including minor versions, and insider and custom builds.

Displays a modal dialog box using the host OS’ facilities. Execution is blocked until the dialog is closed.

from the current environment, if it exists. The environment variable will be removed for the Godot process and any process executed with

If
, the engine filters the time delta measured between each frame, and attempts to compensate for random variation. This will only operate on systems where V-Sync is active.

Returns the ID of the current thread. This can be used in logs to ease debugging of multi-threaded applications.

file system is persistent, so that its state is the same after a player quits and starts the game again. Relevant to the Web platform, where this persistence may be unavailable.
